background_concepts.concept: Multi-armed bandits / delayed feedback in sequential decision-making
background_concepts.why_needed: The vaccine allocation paper frames allocation as a sequential online-learning problem with delayed reward feedback, assuming familiarity with the bandit/regret framework without teaching it.

suggested_resources.title: Introduction to Multi-Armed Bandits (Slivkins) - Foundations and Trends in ML

domain_name: AI/ML for Clinical Prediction and Health Equity

background_concepts.concept: Algorithmic fairness metrics (bias, disparate impact, group fairness)
background_concepts.why_needed: The health-inequality paper quantifies fairness harms across demographic groups and assumes readers know formal fairness notions and how biased data yields biased models without explaining these concepts.

suggested_resources.title: An Introduction to Algorithmic Fairness (Weerts, lecture notes)
Fairness (Machine Learning Crash Course module) - Google Developers

background_concepts.why_needed: The diabetes-prediction paper uses bibliometric methods (citation mapping, co-authorship networks) as its core method without introducing what bibliometrics is or how the metrics are computed.

domain_name: Maternal, Child, and Reproductive Health Digital Systems

background_concepts.why_needed: The paper builds an OCR pipeline for digitizing Mother and Child Protection Cards, assuming knowledge of OCR stages (detection, recognition, post-processing) without explaining them.

domain_name: Health Information System (HIS/DHIS2) Implementation in LMICs

background_concepts.concept: DHIS2 platform and the HISP program
background_concepts.why_needed: Several readings center on DHIS2 deployments and HIV/AGYW programs but assume readers already know what DHIS2 is, its data model (aggregate vs. tracker data), and the HISP institutional network.

domain_name: Secure and Agile mHealth Deployment in the Field

background_concepts.concept: CISO role and information security governance / data classification
background_concepts.why_needed: The paper's title and argument revolve around the absence of a Chief Information Security Officer and data-security classification schemes, assuming familiarity with security governance roles and data-classification mechanisms.

suggested_resources.title: DHIS2 Implementation Guide - security and data ownership section

domain_name: mHealth Behavior Change and Frontline Health Worker Support

background_concepts.why_needed: The Uttar Pradesh case study develops a behavior change communication strategy assuming knowledge of the underlying behavior-change theory that structures such interventions.

suggested_resources.title: The Health Belief Model - Rural Health Promotion and Disease Prevention Toolkit

domain_name: Digital Technology in Pandemic Response and Risk Communication

background_concepts.why_needed: The Bangladesh paper builds on the established public-health RCCE framework used during outbreaks, referencing it as a known institutional mechanism without introducing it.

domain_name: Restless Bandits and Resource Allocation for Public Health Outreach

background_concepts.concept: Restless multi-armed bandits and the Whittle index
background_concepts.why_needed: This domain's methods rest on RMAB formulations and index-based allocation policies, which assume knowledge of Markov decision processes, indexability, and the Whittle index.

suggested_resources.title: Overview of Restless Multi-Armed Bandits, indexability and the Whittle index policy
